projectDescription: A real-time click-voting web app where users support their national team by clicking, with live rankings synced globally and infrastructure designed to handle massive concurrent traffic.
keyFeatures: Real-time global ranking via Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Atomic vote processing with a single Lua script (rate limit + write in one Redis round-trip)
Sliding-window clicks-per-minute counter using per-second DragonFly buckets
Cap proof-of-work captcha integration with progressive difficulty
Daily vote limits per IP and per signed voter_id cookie
Batched click submissions from the client to minimize request volume
Zero-dependency in-memory fallback mode for local development without DragonFly
Coolify one-click deployment with DragonFly, Umami analytics, and Postgres
Cloudflare-aware IP extraction (CF-Connecting-IP) with origin guard secret
Live event detection: overtakes, milestones, and leader changes
Multi-stage Docker build with minimal production runtime image
publicApiSurface: POST /api/vote — submit a batch of votes for one or more countries
GET /api/stream — SSE stream delivering WorldSnapshot updates
GET /api/captcha/session — check whether captcha is required and session is valid
POST /api/captcha/challenge — proxy to Cap standalone server for a PoW challenge
POST /api/captcha/redeem — proxy to Cap server to redeem a solved challenge and create a session cookie
GET /api/health — health check endpoint for Coolify/Traefik
GET /api/status — feature flags status (DragonFly, captcha, Umami)
